data.title: 《Blue Archive》3.5 周年纪念 OST 现已上线数字流媒体！
data.summary: [Blue Archive 3.5-Year Anniversary OST Now Available for Digital Streaming!] Sensei, the digital str
data.body:
[Blue Archive 3.5-Year Anniversary OST Now Available for Digital Streaming!]

Sensei, the digital streaming release of the Blue Archive 3.5-Year Anniversary OST is now live!
Enjoy the anniversary soundtrack filled with memories shared with you, Sensei—listen now!

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2956798

#BlueArchive
